results.rendered_html:
nirdhāv 1 P.
1 To wash off or away, cleanse; nirdhoṃte sati haricaṃdane jalaughaiḥ  Śi. 8. 51 ; nirdhautadānāmalagaṃḍabhittiḥ  R. 5. 43 , 70. 
2 To stream forth, spring from.
3 To run out or escape from.
